  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(org.bukkit.block.data.BlockData blockData)
      Description copied from interface: SpigotPropHandler
      Updates the given BlockData instance with custom property changes.

      Implementations should modify the provided blockData as needed.

      Specified by:
      update in interface SpigotPropHandler
      Parameters:
      blockData - the BlockData to update
